valid.name: order-by-name
valid.code: SELECT id, name FROM users ORDER BY name;

invalid.name: order-by-multiple-positions
invalid.code: SELECT id, name, email FROM users ORDER BY 1, 2 DESC;

errors.message: `ORDER BY <position>` silently breaks when the SELECT list changes. Use the column name or alias instead.
`ORDER BY <position>` silently breaks when the SELECT list changes. Use the column name or alias instead.

invalid.name: order-by-position
invalid.code: SELECT id, name FROM users ORDER BY 1;

errors.message: `ORDER BY <position>` silently breaks when the SELECT list changes. Use the column name or alias instead.
